log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Giff — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Giff — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Giff — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Giff — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Giff — Winged Striker HP: 52/67
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 10 damage. Giff — Winged Striker HP: 42/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Giff — Winged Striker --- HP: 42/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Giff — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Giff — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 21 damage. Giff — Winged Striker HP: 21/67
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Giff — Winged Striker HP: 9/67
→ Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Giff — Winged Striker HP: -7/67
